title: ResourceObserved
description: Raw resource observation sent to native for classification. C-S-S does not classify — native TrackerResolver is sole authority.

url.description: The URL of the intercepted resource

resourceType.description: Resource type: script, image, xmlhttprequest, fetch, iframe, link

potentiallyBlocked.description: Script-side context hint. NOT authoritative — native TrackerResolver determines final blocking state.

pageUrl.description: The URL of the top-level page
